generated_assets.generation_prompt: Realistic close-up inspection photo of a generic handheld OLED game console with cyan and red detachable controllers, touchscreen diagnostic dots, and a tiny cosmetic crack confined to the black bezel; neutral tabletop; no logos, seller data or marketplace UI.

generated_assets.generation_tool: built-in imagegen plus local chroma-key removal

known_source_gaps: The selected OLX listing 1083464946 is unavailable and no approved team screenshot was supplied.
The selected eBay EUR 805 + EUR 5.50 listing could not be recovered; the live category capture is retained and scripted values must remain separately labelled deterministic demo data.
PRM currently reports the product unavailable and Farfetch currently shows PLN 515, not the earlier scripted values.
No real seller is connected to any fictional negotiation, phone call or off-platform-payment behavior.
